reviews.review_body: We had great time attending in SAIBSA. Thank you so much for organising and looking forward for many more!

reviews.author: Mina Devi Rathi
reviews.review_body: My grandaughters and grandson  studies in DRS international school ,everything is great 👍 but only thing about the food it's not good they really need to improve on there food and there ib curriculum is amazing 👏

reviews.author: hrudai sagar
reviews.review_body: DRS International school, this my first experience and they have very creative and interesting Activities for students which will improve there Skills, thankyou for giving me the opportunity to be here A complete 5 start

reviews.author: Namrata Raman Sharma
reviews.review_body:
The school team is very helpful and the infrastructure is tremendous.
The kids here have goals.

The staff ensures that all the students feel safe and secure.

I'll recommend DRS to all parents.

reviews.author: Dinesh Dinnu
reviews.review_body: Excellent facilities with amazing food !! Superb coordination and best arrangements for sports meet !! All the best to participants !!?

reviews.author: Asha Bhanu
reviews.review_body: My daughter Successfully completed schooling in 2018 from DRS international school with a distinction in IBDP. Education from DRS equipped her with confidence and holistic development. She did her Graduation and Post-graduation from top universities in India and the UK with distinction.

reviews.author: Rishon Alam
reviews.review_body: The school truly prepares students for success in academics and beyond

reviews.author: Tarun Kumar
reviews.review_body:
As a parent, I can confidently say that DRS International School is the best in Hyderabad. My son has been studying here, and we’ve seen remarkable growth in him—both academically and personally. With its IB Continuum curriculum, dedicated teachers, and excellent facilities, the school provides the perfect environment for learning and development.

What I love most is the focus on holistic growth, offering a well-balanced mix of academics, sports, arts, and life skills. The campus is safe, well-maintained, and the management is always supportive and responsive. We couldn’t be happier with our choice!

reviews.author: Reddemma A
reviews.review_body: Drs international school, overall its good and State-of-the-art facilities, well-maintained campus, and eco-friendly environment.

reviews.author: T. Sathwik
reviews.review_body: DRS International School is a premier educational institution that offers a holistic learning experience. With its state-of-the-art infrastructure and innovative teaching methods, the school provides a nurturing environment for students to grow and excel. The school's emphasis on academic excellence, extracurricular activities, and character development makes it an ideal choice for parents seeking a well-rounded education.
